column5: Description
Wrap app in ProviderScope. Setup AsyncNotifier base pattern. Configure go_router with GoRouter provider watching auth state. Define AppRouter in core/router/app_router.dart.

Setup lib/features/{feature}/data/{datasource,models,mappers,repositories}/, logic/{contracts,entities,providers,notifiers,states}/, ui/{screens,widgets}/ per feature. lib/core/: supabase/, router/, theme/, utils/, widgets/.
Initialize Supabase in main.dart. Create core/supabase/supabase_service.dart as singleton. Expose SupabaseClient via Riverpod provider in core/supabase/supabase_provider.dart.

Create Flutter project, add dependencies: supabase_flutter, flutter_riverpod, riverpod_annotation, go_router, envied. Configure dart-define environments (.http://env.dev, .http://env.prod). Enable null safety.

core/l10n/: app_en.arb, app_ar.arb. Configure flutter_localizations + intl. Create LocaleNotifier (StateNotifier) in core/providers/locale_provider.dart. Wrap MaterialApp with localizationsDelegates and locale from provider. Handle RTL/LTR via Directionality based on locale.
Create users table: id (uuid FK auth.users), email, full_name, phone, avatar_url, role (user/admin), created_at. Enable RLS: users can read/update own row only.
categories: id, name_en, name_ar, slug, image_url, parent_id (self-ref nullable), is_active, sort_order. RLS: public read, admin write only.

products: id, category_id (FK), name_en, name_ar, description_en, description_ar, base_price, discount_price, images (text[]), is_active, is_featured, sort_order, created_at. RLS: public read, admin write.
product_variants: id, product_id (FK), sku (unique), size, color_en, color_ar, color_hex, price, discount_price, stock, is_active, sort_order. RLS: public read, admin write.

column1: Create Remaining Tables (cart_items, orders, order_items, wishlist, notifications) + RLS
column5: cart_items: id, user_id (FK), variant_id (FK product_variants), quantity, created_at. Unique constraint (user_id, variant_id). RLS: users access own rows only. orders: id, user_id, status (enum), total_amount, shipping_address (jsonb), created_at. order_items: id, order_id, variant_id, quantity, unit_price. wishlist: id, user_id, product_id, created_at. Unique (user_id, product_id). notifications: id, user_id, title, body, type, is_read, order_id (nullable), created_at. RLS: users access own rows only across all tables.

core/theme/app_theme.dart: ThemeData (light + dark), color scheme, text theme (Google Fonts), input decoration theme, button themes, card theme. core/widgets/: app_button.dart, app_text_field.dart, app_loading.dart, app_error_widget.dart, app_empty_state.dart, cached_network_image_widget.dart. No hardcoded colors anywhere — all from ThemeData.

column5: Widget tests for all reusable core/widgets/. Integration tests for auth flow, cart flow, order flow. Use flutter_test + mocktail. Test Riverpod providers with ProviderContainer override pattern. CI-ready test structure.

Configure .env.production. Build release APK and iOS archive. Setup Supabase RLS final review. Configure deep links for go_router. App icon + splash screen via flutter_launcher_icons + flutter_native_splash. ProGuard rules for Android.
Create a separate Flutter Web project for admin panel with clean structure.
Implement login system for admins using Supabase Auth.
Configure Supabase client and environment variables for web platform.
Restrict access to admin-only users using role validation.
Setup feature-first clean architecture (data/domain/presentation) for admin web.
CRUD categories with multilingual support.
Manage sizes, colors, stock, price, discount per product.
Show metrics: total orders, total revenue, product count, recent orders.
CRUD products with category assignment.
Build responsive admin layout with sidebar, topbar, and routing system.
Implement Notifiers for all admin features.
Show full order breakdown with items and user info.
Upload images using Supabase Storage with preview.
Trigger notification creation when order status changes.
View all orders and update status.
Build reusable forms and validation logic.
Optimize queries, pagination, caching.
Enforce row-level security: only admin can modify data.
Reusable data tables with pagination, sorting, filtering.
Test all flows and edge cases.
Build a production-grade REST API backend using Node.js, Express, and Supabase with Feature-Based Architecture. Covers: Auth, Products, Cart, Orders, Wishlist, Notifications, Users, Admin.

Build a production-grade frontend using Next.js 14 App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Zustand, TanStack Query, and next-intl. Covers: Auth, Products, Cart, Checkout, Orders, Wishlist, Notifications, Profile, Admin Panel, AR/EN RTL/LTR.
